statement: In every magma, Equation 2911 (`x = ((y * (x * y)) * x) * z`) implies Equation 4117 (`x * y = ((x * x) * x) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0583
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op y (op x y)) x) z)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, (op x y) = (op (op (op x x) x) x)
